ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stoptime" TEXT /* Stop time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the end station */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* User type (e.g., member, casual) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike used */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "route_path" TEXT /* Path taken by the user (JSON array of coordinates) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (for members) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, mobile app) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the trip experience */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* History of maintenance activities (JSON array of logs) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the station */,
  "is_charging_station" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station has charging facilities for electric bikes */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is accessible to users with disabilities */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Information about nearby landmarks (JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* User type (e.g., member, casual) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the user became a member */,
  "last_trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last trip */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "payment_info" TEXT /* Payment information (JSON object with card details) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information (JSON object with name and phone number) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the mobile app the user is using */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides the user has taken */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the user */,
  "average_ride_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the user's rides */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical trip record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stoptime" TEXT /* Stop time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the end station */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* User type (e.g., member, casual) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the trip for time-series analysis */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike used */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "route_path" TEXT /* Path taken by the user (JSON array of coordinates) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (for members) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, mobile app) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the trip experience */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_history_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_history_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_history_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* ID of the station */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the status update */,
  "bikes_available" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently available at the station */,
  "docks_available" INTEGER /* Number of docks currently available at the station */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Status message (e.g., maintenance, full, empty) */,
  "bikes_in_maintenance" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently in maintenance at the station */,
  "docks_out_of_service" INTEGER /* Number of docks that are out of service */,
  "average_bike_availability" REAL /* Average bike availability over the last hour */,
  "average_dock_availability" REAL /* Average dock availability over the last hour */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if maintenance is needed (e.g., a boolean flag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, member, casual) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_view_reports" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view reports */,
  "can_edit_profiles" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit user profiles */,
  "can_manage_stations" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can manage station information */,
  "can_view_real_time_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view real-time data */,
  "can_access_admin_panel" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can access the admin panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful (e.g., a boolean flag) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the access was unsuccessful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
